name: xenon-edge-widget
description: A self-contained local web widget for Corsair iCUE / Xeneon Edge dashboards: media controls, audio devices, microphone mute, calendar, notes and live system stats — all on Windows.

scripts.dev: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "try{$p=(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3030 -State Listen -EA SilentlyContinue).OwningProcess;if($p){Stop-Process -Id $p -Force -EA SilentlyContinue;Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 600}}catch{} " && node server/server.js
scripts.native:dev: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "Stop-Process -Name xenon-native -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue" && npm run dev --workspace @xenon/native
